_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: We provide evidence for decreased sensitivity of CDC charts in detecting abnormal head growth in children with NF1
resourceName: Centers for Disease Control (CDC) growth charts
details: CDC charts have decreased sensitivity for detecting abnormal head growth in children with NF1, missing participants with developmental delay who had normal head circumference by CDC standards
